description: Normalized DuckLake metadata SQL corpus for DuckDB 1.5.3 / DuckLake 1.0 (Catalog Version 7 / V1_0). Covers attach init, schema/table lifecycle, data files, views, macros, tags, sort info, partition info, and DROP/ALTER cascades. All statements must classify without Unsupported.

statements.sql: SELECT version(), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_settings WHERE name LIKE 'rds%')
statements.description: DuckDB postgres-scanner RDS check at connection open
Connection pool reset — sent by DuckDB when returning a connection

statements.sql: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'duckdb_secrets')

statements.description: Multi-statement pg_catalog scan batch sent via PQsendQuery — critical C1 barrier

statements.sql: SELECT snapshot_id, schema_version, next_catalog_id, next_file_id FROM ducklake_snapshot ORDER BY snapshot_id DESC LIMIT 1
statements.description: DuckLake reads the latest snapshot on attach (classified as SelectFirstSnapshot due to LIMIT 1; returns empty on fresh catalog)
List all schemas in the catalog
List all tables in the catalog
List all columns in the catalog
Read all snapshots (returns empty on fresh catalog — no committed snapshots yet)
Read global DuckLake catalog schema version — must return 7 (V1_0)
Record schema version for new schema

statements.sql: INSERT INTO ducklake_snapshot_changes (snapshot_id, changes_made, author, commit_message) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
INSERT INTO ducklake_table (schema_id, table_name, data_path) VALUES ($1, $2, $3)
INSERT INTO ducklake_column (table_id, column_name, column_type, column_id) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
statements.description: Add a column to a table

statements.sql: INSERT INTO ducklake_table_stats (table_id, record_count, file_size_bytes) VALUES ($1, $2, $3)
INSERT INTO ducklake_table_column_stats (table_id, column_id, null_count, distinct_count) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
INSERT INTO ducklake_inlined_data_tables (table_id, table_name, schema_version) VALUES ($1, $2, $3)
statements.description: Register an inlined-data table (tag, sort_info, partition_column, etc.)

statements.sql: INSERT INTO ducklake_data_file (table_id, path, file_format, row_count, file_size_bytes) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
statements.description: Register a new Parquet data file

statements.sql: INSERT INTO ducklake_file_column_stats (file_id, column_id, null_count, row_count) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
INSERT INTO ducklake_delete_file (file_id, path, file_format, row_count, file_size_bytes) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
INSERT INTO ducklake_tag (catalog_id, begin_snapshot, tag_name, tag_value) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
statements.description: Insert a table tag (stored as inlined row)

statements.sql: INSERT INTO ducklake_column_tag (catalog_id, begin_snapshot, tag_name, tag_value) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
statements.description: Insert a column tag (stored as inlined row)

statements.sql: INSERT INTO ducklake_sort_info (sort_id, table_id, begin_snapshot, column_id, sort_order) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
statements.description: Insert a sort expression (stored as inlined row)

statements.sql: INSERT INTO ducklake_partition_column (partition_id, table_id, begin_snapshot, column_id, transform) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
statements.description: Insert a partition column (stored as inlined row)

statements.sql: INSERT INTO ducklake_view (schema_id, view_name, view_definition, dialect) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
INSERT INTO ducklake_macro (schema_id, macro_name, macro_uuid) VALUES ($1, $2, $3)
INSERT INTO ducklake_macro_impl (macro_id, return_type, macro_body) VALUES ($1, $2, $3)
INSERT INTO ducklake_macro_parameters (macro_id, parameter_name, parameter_type) VALUES ($1, $2, $3)
UPDATE ducklake_table_stats SET record_count = $1, file_size_bytes = $2 WHERE table_id = $3
UPDATE ducklake_table SET end_snapshot = $1 WHERE table_id = $2
statements.description: Retire a table (DROP TABLE — set end_snapshot)

statements.sql: UPDATE ducklake_column SET end_snapshot = $1 WHERE table_id = $2
statements.description: Retire all columns for a dropped table

statements.sql: UPDATE ducklake_data_file SET end_snapshot = $1 WHERE table_id = $2
statements.description: Retire all data files for a dropped table

statements.sql: UPDATE ducklake_schema SET end_snapshot = $1 WHERE schema_id = $2
statements.description: Retire a schema (DROP SCHEMA — set end_snapshot)

statements.sql: UPDATE ducklake_view SET end_snapshot = $1 WHERE view_id = $2
statements.description: Retire a view (DROP VIEW — set end_snapshot)

statements.sql: UPDATE ducklake_macro SET end_snapshot = $1 WHERE macro_id = $2
statements.description: Retire a macro (DROP MACRO — set end_snapshot)

statements.sql: UPDATE ducklake_metadata SET value = '1.1-dev1' WHERE key = 'version'
statements.description: DuckLake v1.1 migration statement — classified and rejected at runtime; never applied to version field

statements.sql: SELECT MAX(snapshot_id) FROM ducklake_snapshot WHERE snapshot_id > $1
statements.description: DuckLake checks for new snapshots since last read
DuckLake reads the max snapshot ID
